subcodes.first_line: The ocean of generosity is manifest and the sun of divine favor hath dawned, yet there is no ear to perceive the waves of the sea [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: دریای کرم ظاهر و آفتاب عنایت الهی مشرق ولکن گوشی نه تا امواج بحر را بیابد و
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @martyrs and martyrdom, @consolation and comfort, @exhortations and counsels, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
